goal: Archive root-level duplicate JavaScript files that are no longer loaded by index.html or the script manifest.
notes: The archived files were not referenced by index.html or active script manifest groups.
Matching search hits left in js/core/app-core.js are migration comments only.
Files were moved to archive instead of deleted so they can be restored if needed.
verification: Confirmed each active manifest script still exists.
Confirmed initial manifest still excludes large jiangshen and training data.
Confirmed no active index.html or script-manifest.js reference points to the archived root files.
